title: 2024917Dry 87W547
summary:
Main
· Capesize Rally Fizzles Out as Iron Ore Prices Drop - Capesize rates eased after hitting two-month highs , as lower iron ore prices combined with recent soft Chinese economic data weighed on sentiment. A cyclone in the Pacific that directly hit Shanghai has led to some disruption in cargo flow and vessel positioning, but we expect any pricing impact to fade as the week progresses. Overall, a stable market is to be expected , with the futures curve in a slight contango and expectations for a strong winter market offsetting the bleak macro signals coming from China.
